notes: Exponential-OU optimal-level pairs (closed-form AR(1)->OU sigma bands). Pairs EU/GU(0/1) AU/NU(2/3) XAU/EU(4/0). Host leg via framework magic; partner legs via QM_BasketOpenPosition at their slots; both/all legs open+close together; warmup via QM_SymbolGuardInit+QM_BasketWarmupHistory. Closed-form estimators only, NO ML, no external feed. All legs in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
